note: Bundled sample data for offline/demo use: representative Horizon Europe call topics (titles and budgets are illustrative of typical Cluster 5/6 and CBE JU calls, not live records). The live tier queries the EU Funding & Tenders search API; the finder-data GitHub Action writes a fresher snapshot to grants.json.

items.title: Circular solutions for regional bio-based systems (sample topic)
items.summary: Innovation actions deploying circular bioeconomy value chains at regional scale: biomass residue valorisation, biorefinery side streams, industrial symbiosis and circular business models reducing greenhouse-gas emissions in carbon-intensive regions.

items.title: Bio-based materials replacing fossil and carbon-intensive products (sample topic)
items.summary: Research and innovation on bio-based polymers, construction materials and packaging with lower carbon footprint, including life-cycle assessment, recyclability and safe-and-sustainable-by-design criteria.

items.title: Circular Bio-based Europe JU: biorefinery demonstration at flagship scale (sample topic)
items.summary: Flagship innovation actions demonstrating integrated biorefineries converting sustainable biomass and biowaste into bio-based chemicals, materials and fuels, with strong circular economy and rural development impact.

items.title: Carbon farming and soil carbon sequestration in agricultural landscapes (sample topic)
items.summary: Actions improving monitoring, reporting and verification of soil carbon, incentives for carbon farming, agroecology and nutrient management contributing to climate mitigation and biodiversity.

items.title: EU Soil Mission: living labs for soil health in carbon-intensive regions (sample topic)
items.summary: Living labs and lighthouses restoring soil health on degraded and post-mining land, combining soil monitoring, bioremediation, land-use planning and stakeholder co-creation for a just transition.

items.title: Renewable energy valleys coupling wind, solar and bioenergy (sample topic)
items.summary: Demonstration of renewable energy communities integrating wind, photovoltaics, sustainable bioenergy and storage, with digital energy management and measurable CO2 emission reduction.

items.title: Industrial carbon capture, utilisation and storage of biogenic CO2 (sample topic)
items.summary: Piloting capture and utilisation of biogenic carbon dioxide from biorefineries and bioenergy plants (BECCS/BECCU), permanent storage and conversion into carbon-negative products.

items.title: Zero-pollution nutrient recovery from waste water and bio-waste (sample topic)
items.summary: Circular nutrient recovery: recycling nitrogen and phosphorus from waste water, manure and bio-waste into bio-based fertilisers, cutting pollution and fossil fertiliser dependence.

items.title: Just transition and citizen engagement in rural bioeconomy communities (sample topic)
items.summary: Research and innovation on fair and inclusive green transitions: stakeholder co-creation, social innovation, skills and governance enabling rural and carbon-intensive communities to benefit from the bioeconomy.

items.title: Digital product passports and data spaces for circular value chains (sample topic)
items.summary: Twin green and digital transition: interoperable data spaces, digital product passports and AI-supported material tracking enabling circular economy decisions across manufacturing value chains.

items.title: LIFE Climate Change Mitigation: land use, agriculture and forestry (sample topic)
items.summary: LIFE standard action projects reducing greenhouse-gas emissions in land use and agriculture: peatland rewetting, agroforestry, sustainable forest management and carbon sink enhancement.

items.title: Nature-based solutions for biodiversity and climate resilience (sample topic)
items.summary: Demonstrating nature-based solutions that restore ecosystems and biodiversity while delivering climate adaptation and mitigation co-benefits in urban and rural landscapes.

items.title: Widening participation: twinning for bioeconomy research capacity (sample topic)
items.summary: Twinning actions strengthening research capacity of widening countries in sustainable bioeconomy, FAIR data infrastructures and open science for sustainability assessment.

items.title: Sustainable biofuels and renewable fuels of non-biological origin for transport (sample topic)
items.summary: Advanced biofuels from residual biomass and renewable hydrogen-based fuels for aviation and shipping, with sustainability certification and greenhouse-gas life-cycle accounting.
